prior_learnings.title: Chakra UI Modal does not forward data-testid to any DOM node
prior_learnings.relevance: InviteMemberModal already puts data-testid on ModalContent (line 153), not Modal — keep that pattern when enlarging the modal.

prior_learnings.title: Playwright selectOption can force-set a disabled option's DOM value in Chromium
prior_learnings.relevance: Explains why AC-E2E-5/8's existing specs assert invite-submit-btn stays disabled rather than trusting the <select>'s DOM value. The row-based replacement has the same bypass risk (Playwright .click() can dispatch on a row with no onClick handler) — new specs must keep asserting app state (submit button / selectedPubkeyHex), not a DOM 'disabled' attribute on the row.

similar-features.current_dropdown: app/src/components/groups/InviteMemberModal.tsx:170-200 — Chakra <Select data-testid="invite-contact-select"> inside FormControl; options from `entries` (selectableContactsForGroup), label = nickname||truncateNpub(npub) + disabled-reason suffix; disabled={!entry.selectable}. Selection state: selectedPubkeyHex; validity via isSelectionValid (contacts.ts:97-99).
similar-features.row_pattern_to_mirror: ContactListView in app/pages/contacts.tsx:120-170 — LinkBox as="article", p={4} borderWidth="1px" borderRadius="lg" borderColor="borderSubtle" bg="surfaceBg" cursor="pointer" _hover={{ borderColor: 'brand.400', bg: 'surfaceMutedBg' }} transition="all 0.15s", data-testid=`contact-card-${pubkeyHex}`, Flex align="center" gap={3} wrapping ProfileSummary(size="sm") + optional Badge. Use as the row shell but replace LinkBox/LinkOverlay/NextLink with a plain clickable Box/Flex (onClick sets selectedPubkeyHex) since picker rows must not navigate (AC-UX-7).
similar-features.selected_disabled_state_convention: No RadioGroup-based row-list precedent exists. Closest 'pick one of many, show active state' UI is the theme picker (app/pages/settings.tsx:605-660): aria-pressed={isActive}, borderWidth="2px", borderColor active ? brand.500 : borderSubtle, boxShadow active ? '0 0 0 2px brand.500' : 'sm', _focusVisible boxShadow '0 0 0 3px brand.500'. Recommended combination (explorer's judgment call, adopted): contacts.tsx row shell as base + borderColor/boxShadow 'brand.400' + aria-pressed for selected state (skip the settings page's checkmark badge as overkill for a text row); opacity={0.5} cursor="not-allowed" + no onClick for disabled rows (no existing disabled-row convention elsewhere — this is a judgment call, documented here).
similar-features.profile_summary_api: app/src/components/ProfileSummary.tsx:22-26 — { profile: UserProfile, fallbackName: string, size?: 'sm'|'md' }; UserProfile needs only nickname/avatar.
similar-features.copy_keys_reuse_only: copy.groups.inviteContactLabel, inviteReasonAlreadyMember, inviteReasonBlocked (i18n.ts ~114-116, ~1237-1239) — no new i18n entries needed.

testing-and-conventions.helper: app/tests/e2e/helpers/group-setup.ts:80-103 (inviteContactViaPicker) — sole call site: opens modal, waits invite-contact-select visible, waits option[value=inviteeHex] toBeAttached (comment cites VQ-S3-006 anti-race rationale), selectOption(inviteeHex), clicks invite-submit-btn. Doc comment at lines 55-79 explicitly names invite-contact-select — must be rewritten.
testing-and-conventions.spec_groups-invite-pending-contact-selec: lines 112-135 (AC-E2E-8): asserts Bob's disabled option toBeAttached+toBeDisabled, Carol's enabled option toBeAttached+toBeEnabled; selectOption({value:bobHex}).catch(()=>{}); asserts invite-submit-btn toBeDisabled + invite-error/invite-success not visible. Load-bearing assertion is the submit button, not option DOM state (see playwright-selectoption learning).
testing-and-conventions.spec_groups-invite-guidance-state: lines 80-84 (AC-E2E-7): asserts scoped-absence of invite-contact-select inside invite-member-modal-content (toHaveCount(0)) + invite-submit-btn toBeDisabled.
testing-and-conventions.spec_groups-error-cases: lines 92-112 (AC-E2E-5): same shape as AC-E2E-8 — disabled option attached+disabled, selectOption(...).catch(()=>{}), assert submit disabled + no error/success visible.
testing-and-conventions.no_other_call_sites: Repo-wide grep for invite-contact-select / invite-submit-btn / InviteMemberModal across app/tests/e2e/ returns only the four files above.
testing-and-conventions.non-interactive_assertion_convention: No aria-disabled/pointer-events convention in this repo's e2e suite. Established pattern (groups-admin.spec.ts:206-211, contact-card-share.spec.ts:67, groups-polls.spec.ts:126-134) is toBeDisabled() on native-disabled buttons. For the new row picker, follow the already-established AC-E2E-5/8 pattern: attempt the click, then assert app state (invite-submit-btn stays disabled, no invite-error/invite-success) rather than any DOM attribute on the row.
